page_metadata.biotools__summary: Metagenome@Kin is an automated high throughput sequencing data analysis tool for the 16S/28S/ITS rRNA genes. It measures the composition and diversity of microbial and fungal species in natural environments.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Metagenome@Kin is an automated high throughput sequencing data analysis tool for the 16S/28S/ITS rRNA genes. It measures the composition and diversity of microbial and fungal species in natural environments.
